parameters.query: WITH a AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE result='success') AS success, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE result='failure') AS failure, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE result='escalated') AS escalated, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE provider='local') AS local_calls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE provider='anthropic') AS cloud_calls FROM audit_log WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), e AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='processed') AS processed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='failed') AS failed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('pending','processing')) AS in_flight FROM events WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), al AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS firing FROM system_alerts WHERE status='firing' AND acknowledged=FALSE), dl AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS open FROM dead_letter WHERE resolved=FALSE), inv AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='needs_review' OR requires_human=TRUE) AS needs_review, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='matched') AS matched FROM invoices WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), em AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS classified_24h FROM emails WHERE received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'), s AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_gbp),0)::numeric(10,4) AS gbp FROM model_usage_history WHERE provider='anthropic' AND ts >= date_trunc('month', NOW())) SELECT a.success AS audit_success, a.failure AS audit_failure, a.escalated AS audit_escalated, CASE WHEN (a.local_calls + a.cloud_calls) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * a.local_calls / (a.local_calls + a.cloud_calls), 1) ELSE NULL END AS sovereignty_pct, a.local_calls, a.cloud_calls, e.processed AS events_processed, e.failed AS events_failed, e.in_flight AS events_in_flight, al.firing AS alerts_firing, dl.open AS dead_letters_open, inv.needs_review AS invoices_needs_review, inv.matched AS invoices_matched, em.classified_24h AS emails_24h, s.gbp AS mtd_spend_gbp FROM a, e, al, dl, inv, em, s;
